name: perf-kp-sql
description: Kunpeng + MongoDB joint perf diagnosis. SSH-based collection + 202-case distilled markdown case library (LLM-orchestrated 6-phase pipeline · CASES.md + INDEX.md routing) + NotebookLM authoritative refresh + flamegraph stack pattern matching. Harness-agnostic (Anthropic Agent Skills standard).

interface.longDescription: SSH-based remote collection (8-cmd 环境画像 + per-case 命令拉指标), 6-phase LLM-orchestrated pipeline routing user symptoms against 202-case markdown case library (cases/INDEX.md + best-practice/INDEX.md) with NotebookLM as authoritative refresh, and emits an impact-ranked markdown report. First-time use: run /perf-kp-sql-setup to register NotebookLM.
defaultPrompt: 诊断 mongo 数据库性能问题: host=10.0.0.1 user=root privateKeyPath=~/.ssh/id_ed25519
